parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: When On the Trail will record its input.

parameters.name: growlength
parameters.label: Grow Length
parameters.description: When On the length of the Trail 's recording will keep getting longer as the timeline moves forward. Use this for recording any length as needed.

parameters.name: wlength
parameters.label: Window Length
parameters.description: The amount of history recorded is set by Length. The Units menu on the right determine which units to use in the parameter (Samples, Frames, Seconds). A setting of 4 seconds will show the value of the

parameters.name: wlengthunit
parameters.label: Window Length Unit
parameters.description: Choose between using Samples, Frames, or Seconds as the units for the Length parameter.

parameters.name: resample
parameters.label: Resample
parameters.description: Enable parameter below to resample the output to a different length.

parameters.name: samples
parameters.label: Resample
parameters.description: Resample the output to this specified length.

parameters.name: setrate
parameters.label: Rate
parameters.description: Enable parameter below to use a different sample rate.

parameters.name: rate
parameters.label: Sample Rate
parameters.description: Resample using this sample rate instead of the global frame rate ( ).

parameters.name: reset
parameters.label: Reset
parameters.description: While On, this toggle resets the channel(s) to 0.

parameters.name: resetpulse
parameters.label: Reset Pulse
parameters.description: Click to instantly resets the channel(s) to 0.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
